replies.msg:
有英譯
可廣傳
可retweet

A girl in Mongkok, Kowloon of Hong Kong was seen abducted by some people and taken into a car near 21:35 on 2019-11-02. She screamed and resisted, but to no avail. The kidnappers shut her mouth up, subdued her, and drove away. This kind of abduction and kidnapping have been a common tactic by pro-government groups, or possibly the police, against young democratic protesters, and their whereabouts are sometimes never known.
網上查下車主係乜野人
